claims.supporting_quote: Elevated fasting insulin levels (FI), indicative of altered insulin secretion and sensitivity, may precede type 2 diabetes (T2D) and cardiovascular disease onset.

coverage_notes: Manually grounded by Claude reading Stage3b abstracts directly (no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY available for automated Stage4b in this environment). Marker source: disease_clinical_biomarkers.py (real lab/clinical biomarker), not the gene-target panel.
